entity: 2017-18 Houston Rockets regular-season record 65-17 (Harden MVP year, 1-seed in West, took GSW to 7 games in WCF)
notes: Warehouse row matches BBR (65-17, 1st in West/Southwest). HOU led the league in 3-point attempts (3,470) and made 3s (1,256) by wide margins. HOU took GSW to 7 games in WCF, with the famous 0-27 three-point-shooting streak in Game 7.
